TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Seljupetje, title = Seljupetje, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seljupetje} }

S.FORM: alang Seljupetje ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 38 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 59%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seljupetje hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seljupetje ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seljupetje ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Seljupetje ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 38 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 59%, Amis 3%, Puyuma 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seljupetje hya' ga Mulinaga. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seljupetje ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seljupetje ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕeljupetje ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na s~ɕeljupetje ħjaʔ ɣa mulinaɣa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕeljupetje ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕeljupetje ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
